However, there is a plant called "Kongia dasycarpa". Kongia dasycarpa is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. Kongia dasycarpa is a plant that has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, and it is known to have various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The bioactive constituents of Kongia dasycarpa include glucosinolates, flavonoids, and alkaloids. Kongia dasycarpa is commonly prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its potential health benefits.
